title: Dead Mount Death Play
sourceNotes: Cumulative episodes across Part 1 (12) + Part 2 (12) = 24 total. Manga ongoing (current ch. 152 across 17+ volumes). The anime adapts manga chapters 1-81 (through the start of Vol. 10); viewers are pointed to pick the manga back up at ch. 82. Episode-to-chapter ranges are sourced directly from the fandom wiki's per-episode 'Adapted From' chapter listings; arc names are drawn from the manga's own in-story volume 'Episode' titles (e.g. Vol. 1 = 'Episode 1: The Calamity, Alive and Well'). A couple of episodes straddle two volumes' worth of material — the shared boundary chapter is credited to the earlier episode/arc for a clean split.

mappings.arc: The Evil Bones of the Frontier
The Way of the Jesting Dragons
The Sudden Turning of the Celestial Sphere
The Beautiful Woman's Pilgrimage / The Saint's Aid (partial)
